summary: This document outlines the deprecated architecture for caching AI voice responses within the KeepMeCompany backend system. It details strategies for fine-tuning filler words and implementing a TTS layer that prioritizes cached audio over generation to improve efficiency. The notes also describe a continuous improvement loop for comparing LLM responses and identifying deviations.
